name: list_dir
description: List the entries of a workspace directory. Non-recursive; for recursive walks, the agent should call list_dir per level (cheaper than a hidden recursion budget). Subject to the §11 sandbox.

path.description: Workspace-relative or absolute path. Absolute paths must be inside the §11 sandbox.

include_hidden.description: If true, include dotfiles (e.g., .gitignore). Default false.

bytes.description: File size in bytes. Absent for non-files.
